prose:
Frontier orbital calculation on formaldehyde (CH₂O, 4 atoms: O, C, H, H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet). Single-point calculation on the user-supplied geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz; geometry was not re-optimized at this level. SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity checker: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Key results:
- HOMO (index 7): −7.6523067 eV
- LUMO (index 8): −1.7826355 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 5.8696712 eV
- Total electronic energy: −114.55325 Hartree (−3117.1528 eV)

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 7.6523067 eV, vertical EA = 1.7826355 eV, electronegativity = 4.7174711 eV, chemical hardness = 2.9348356 eV, chemical softness = 0.34073459 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 3.7914447 eV.

CLI invocation: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz
